title: senna cardiosperma subsp. pilocarina
intro: Senna cardiosperma subsp. pilocarina, also known as the Cape senna, is a plant species native to South Africa, belonging to the legume family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and laxative effects. The health benefits of Senna cardiosperma subsp. pilocarina include relief from constipation, reduction of fever, and treatment of respiratory infections. Senna cardiosperma subsp. pilocarina can be prepared as a tea or dried root infusion for medicinal use, although caution is advised due to its potential side effects.
